reviews.review_description: After spending $15 I thought I would have fun but it is really nerve racking and I can’t get money in the second level I have lost so much money on the pistol but I keep dying and even worse I can’t return the game so that’s $15 wasted

I bought The Hole Never Ends hoping for a fun and scary VR horror experience, but got a frustrating, tedious, half finished mess instead. The game is sloppy and poorly made, with muddy textures, stiff animations, janky controls, and effects slapped together in a weekend, which seems common for low effort VR titles, and I would not be surprised if 50 percent of the assets were straight up stolen. The real killer is the incredibly tedious core loop, where you drop everything, including your hard earned items, weapons, and even the essential non permanent pickaxe, every time you die to glitchy, poorly coded monsters with broken pathfinding, unfair lunges, and hitboxes, forcing you to recollect the same stuff over and over with no permanent storage or checkpoints. This turns tense exploration into pure repetitive punishment that kills any scares, and despite running smoothly because it is such a poorly made Unity game, I would not recommend it to anyone. Save your money and sanity. TLDR: game a little unfair, very janky, and not worth 15 dollars. Don’t buy.

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear the game didn't meet your expectations.

Please note that every safe house features a checkpoint and provides a free basic pickaxe to help you get back on track.

We hope this information improves your experience. Thank you for your feedback—we are committed to continuous updates, including new content and performance optimizations.

developer_response.body:
Hey! We're really sorry you ran into this — we know how frustrating a broken tutorial is, especially right at the start.
We're looking into tutorial issues right now. Please try reinstalling the game or deleting your save data. In the meantime, can you describe what happened? (e.g. did a prompt not appear, couldn't pick something up, game froze?). You can reach us at theholeneverends@thesmartmelon.com. 
If you'd like a refund, Meta handles that through their support page — but we'd love the chance to fix your experience first!

It was VERY worth the wait; It is fun to play, has a well balanced difficulty and enjoyable gimmicks on the way. 

I can already see the replay value of this game and honestly there aren't many more words to say. I like how there are many types of rocks to mine and sell on the way. 


Spoilers:

I really enjoyed the area where you put the batteries in the slots to open the door, the parcore in the final act with the worms I loved too, it's peak. 

Improvements:

I think some bug fixes are needed; eg: I found that you can put the backpack on the seller and get infinite money, I didn't abuse this but It's definitely there for someone else to. 
I think doing some minor bug fixes would be good before adding new content. 

Content ideas: 

A rouge like mode where the map is random and smaller than the pre made ones. 

Multiplayer with up to 8 people per lobby

More chapters to the game in general

More items.

Edit1: 

I found an Issue where if you die the Keys to the electrical area don't respawn and you have your delete your save, I recommend either Making them respawn or having the player drop their loot.

Edit 2: the key issue is fixed! However I have some more bugs that could be patched:

1: the game crashes apon opening sometimes and even once happened mid game

2: the size of the blue rarity orb item is large In the backpack

3: ores and mined items can spawn too far from their stone and get stuck and become impossible to mine and grab

Hope this helps.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the detailed feedback and bug reports. We really appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. More new content is already in development, so please stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
This game when I bought it I thought would be terrible, Considering it’s new. But when I loaded in i was blown away, this game has a way of being so scary but so fun! At first I would not even drop down the ladder so I got my friends to help me. The second level was very scary and fun. I recommend this game to everyone and these are my suggestions.

Multiplayer pls.
More levels.



And there is a glitch where items will be stuck in the dirt and won’t fall down. 
Thank you for your time dev.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! We’re really glad you’re enjoying the game. More content is already in development, so please stay tuned!
